title: Pink Cooling Gel Bath Pillow | Soothing Gel Bathtub Pillow | Great for Relaxation, Head & Neck Support | Perfect Bath Pillow for Bathtub, Hot Tub & Home Spa | Fits Easily in Any Size of Tubs & Jacuzzi
features: ENCHANCED BATHING EXPERIENCE: Elevate your bath time into a spa-like retreat, transforming each soak into a luxurious escape that allows the day's stress to melt away as you recline in comfort and style.
PREMIUM MATERIAL - The bathtub pillow is made of high-quality Polyurethane Foam, which provides enough grip and provides a super soft and comfortable experience.

ULTIMATE RELAXATION - The bath pillow envelops seamlessly contours and supports your head, neck and shoulders to ease those tense and tired muscles after a long day. Smart design provides strategic support for sensitive joints & muscles. Helps prevent aches & soreness. Perfect for while you're soaking in a bubble bath, Jacuzzi & spa.
SUITABLE FOR ANY TUB - The flexibility of the bath pillow is adaptable to any shape tub, or Jacuzzi. Perfect for while you're soaking in a Bubble Bath, Jacuzzi and Home Spa.

NON SLIP SURFACE – Made with high-quality material and soothing get which is keeping firmly fixed to the surface of your bathtub. The non-slip bath pillow provides you with better comfort and stable place for relaxing your head.

COMFORTABLE SUPPORT - Rest your head and relax your sore neck into the bath pillow for luxurious comfort and relaxation. The pillow cradles around your head, neck, shoulders and provides you ultimate support & comfort.
